case_title: STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER VS. GLOBAL MILK, LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT GLOBAL MILK, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA BUBBLECUP WU, ELIZABETH NICOLE AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA BUBBLECUP JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GLOBAL MILK, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA BUBBLECUP WU, ELIZABETH NICOLE AN INDIVIDUAL, DBA BUBBLECUP $25,847.38 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $25,847.38, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
